name: gb200_nvl576_ideal_single_tier
_comment: Hypothetical 576-GPU scale-up domain flattened onto a single monolithic NVLink fabric — every pair of ranks enjoys intra-rack-class latency (0.5 us) and bandwidth (900 GB/s). Physically unrealizable at this radix; serves as the upper bound against which the realistic 2-tier NVL576 can be compared.
